mapper.insert: INSERT INTO /*CustRequestMapper.insertCustRequestMst*/ NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST ( CUST_REQ_SEQ, REQ_TYPE, USERID, CSTMR_NAME, MOBILE_NO, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, CRET_ID, SYS_RDATE ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{reqType}, #{userId}, #{cstmrName}, #{mobileNo}, #{cstmrNativeRrn}, #{contractNum}, #{cstmrType}, #{onlineAuthType}, #{onlineAuthInfo}, #{userId}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO /*CustRequestMapper.insertCustRequestCallList*/ NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_CALL_LIST ( CUST_REQ_SEQ, START_DATE, END_DATE, CALL_TYPE, TYPE_VOICE, TYPE_TEXT, TYPE_DATA, TYPE_VOICE_TEXT, TYPE_ALL, REQ_RSN, RECV_TYPE, RECV_TEXT, CALL_NUM, MAIL_ADDR, ETC_MEMO, CRET_ID, SYS_RDATE, PROC_CD ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{callType}, #{typeVoice}, #{typeText}, #{typeData}, #{typeVoiceText}, #{typeAll}, #{reqRsn}, #{recvType}, #{recvText}, #{callNum}, #{mailAddr}, #{etcMemo}, #{cretId}, SYSDATE, 'RQ' )
mapper.select: SELECT A.CUST_REQ_SEQ, A.REQ_TYPE, A.USERID, A.CSTMR_NAME, A.MOBILE_NO, CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ELSE '' END AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CASE WHEN A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN '' ELSE A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.CSTMR_TYPE, A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, A.CRET_ID, A.SYS_RDATE, B.SCAN_ID, B.START_DATE, B.END_DATE, B.CALL_TYPE, B.TYPE_VOICE, B.TYPE_TEXT, B.TYPE_DATA, B.TYPE_VOICE_TEXT, B.TYPE_ALL, B.REQ_RSN, B.RECV_TYPE, B.RECV_TEXT, B.CALL_NUM, B.MAIL_ADDR, B.ETC_MEMO, B.UPDT_ID, B.SYS_UDATE, B.START_DATE || '-' || B.END_DATE AS REQUEST_DATE, REGEXP_REPLACE(A.MOBILE_NO, '(.{3})(.+)(.{4})', '\1-\2-\3') AS REQUEST_MOBILE_NO, REGEXP_REPLACE(B.CALL_NUM, '(.{3})(.+)(.{4})', '\1-\2-\3') AS CALL_MOBILE_NO, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'yyyy') AS REQUEST_YEAR, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'mm') AS REQUEST_MONTH, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'dd') AS REQUEST_DAY, A.CSTMR_NAME AS REQUEST_CSTMR_NAME, CASE WHEN B.CALL_TYPE = 'NA' THEN 'V' WHEN (B.TYPE_VOICE = 'Y' OR B.TYPE_TEXT = 'Y' OR B.TYPE_DATA = 'Y' OR B.TYPE_VOICE_TEXT = 'Y' OR B.TYPE_ALL = 'Y') THEN 'V' ELSE '' END CALL_TYPE_NA, CASE WHEN B.CALL_TYPE = 'IN' THEN 'V' ELSE '' END CALL_TYPE_IN FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST A, NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_CALL_LIST B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custRequestSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE /*CustRequestMapper.updateEmvScanMstCL */ EMV_SCAN_MST SET WORK_ID = 'S0010', DOC_TITLE = CUST_NM || '_통화내역열람신청' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
UPDATE /*CustRequestMapper.updateEmvScanFileCL */ EMV_SCAN_FILE SET DOC_ID = 'E0010' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
mapper.select: SELECT /*CustRequestMapper.getReqNmChgData */ A.CUST_REQ_SEQ , A.REQ_TYPE , A.USERID , A.CSTMR_NAME AS GR_CSTMR_NAME , A.MOBILE_NO AS GR_MOBILE_NO , A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN AS GR_CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CSTMR_TYPE , A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE AS GR_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS GR_RES_NO , B.SCAN_ID , B.CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_TYPE AS AS_CSTMR_TYPE , CASE WHEN B.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ELSE '' END AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , CASE WHEN B.CSTMR_TYPE = 'FN' THEN '' ELSE B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , DECODE(B.CSTMR_TYPE,'NM',C.NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE,B.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE) AS ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , DECODE(B.CSTMR_TYPE,'NM',C.NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO,B.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO) AS RES_NO , B.CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG , B.CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG , B.REQ_INFO_CHG_YN , B.SOC_NM AS RATE_NAME , B.CSTMR_POST , B.CSTMR_ADDR || ' ' || B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS CSTMR_ADDR , B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , B.CSTMR_MAIL , B.REQ_PAY_TYPE , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BNK' AND DTL_CD = B.REQ_BANK) AS REQ_BANK , B.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , B.REQ_CARD_COMPANY , B.REQ_CARD_NO , B.REQ_CARD_YY , B.REQ_CARD_MM , DECODE(B.CSTMR_TYPE,'NM',C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE,B.SELF_CERT_TYPE) AS SELF_CERT_TYPE , DECODE(B.CSTMR_TYPE,'NM',C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT,B.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT) AS SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , DECODE(B.CSTMR_TYPE,'NM',C.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM,B.SELF_ISSU_NUM) AS SELF_ISSU_NUM , B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN || '-' || B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN || '-' || B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , 'ICN3' AS OPER_TYPE , SUBSTR (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 4) AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY , SUBSTR (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 5, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM , SUBSTR (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 7, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD , 'V' AS GR_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG --핸드폰 할부금 명의받는 고객에게 승계 , B.JEHU_PROD_TYPE , B.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE , B.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE , 'N' AS CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG , 'N' AS CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG --명의변경 시 제휴사 동의는 항상 'N' , B.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE , B.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE , NVL(( SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE DTL_CD = B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION AND CD_GROUP_ID = 'NATIONLIST' ), B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , C.NEE_AGENT_NAME AS MINOR_AGENT_NAME , (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM MCP_CODE WHERE CODE_SYS = 'AGR' AND CODE = C.NEE_AGENT_TYPE_CD) AS MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , C.NEE_AGENT_RRN AS MINOR_AGENT_RRN , C.NEE_AGENT_TEL_NO AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , NVL(B.CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , 'N') AS CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , NVL(B.CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , 'N') AS CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG2 FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST A , NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG B , NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = C.CUST_REQ_SEQ(+) AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custRequestSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE /*CustRequestMapper.updateEmvScanMstNC */ EMV_SCAN_MST SET WORK_ID = 'S0003', DOC_TITLE = CUST_NM || '_명의변경' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
UPDATE /*CustRequestMapper.updateEmvScanFileNC */ EMV_SCAN_FILE SET DOC_ID = 'E0003' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.GROUP_CODE, B.PAGE_SEQ, C.PAGE_CODE, C.COLUMN_NAME, C.METAROW, C.METALINE, C.CODEDATA, C.CODEDATA_YN, C.DELETECOLUMNYN, C.APP_KEY FROM NMCP_APP_GROUP_MST A, NMCP_APP_GROUP_INFO B, NMCP_APP_FORM_INFO C WHERE A.STATUS = 'A' AND A.GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND A.GROUP_CODE = B.GROUP_CODE AND B.STATUS = 'A' AND B.PAGE_CODE = C.PAGE_CODE ORDER BY B.PAGE_SEQ, C.APP_KEY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO /*CustRequestMapper.insertCustRequestJoinForm*/ NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_JOIN_FORM ( CUST_REQ_SEQ, RECV_TYPE, FAX_NO, CSTMR_POST, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_DTL, PROC_CD, CRET_ID, SYS_RDATE ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{recvType}, #{faxNo}, #{cstmrPost}, #{cstmrAddr}, #{cstmrAddrDtl}, 'RQ', #{cretId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
UPDATE /*CustRequestMapper.updateEmvScanMst */ EMV_SCAN_MST SET
WORK_ID = 'S0010', DOC_TITLE = CUST_NM || '_통화내역열람신청'
WORK_ID = 'S0008', DOC_TITLE = CUST_NM || '_휴대폰안심보험가입'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}

UPDATE /*CustRequestMapper.updateEmvScanFile */ EMV_SCAN_FILE SET
DOC_ID = 'E0010'
DOC_ID = 'E0008'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}

/* CustRequestMapper.insertEmvScanFile */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE ( FILE_ID, SCAN_ID, FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, USE_YN, ORIGIN_DIR, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID ) SELECT FILE_ID, #{scanIdOrg} AS SCAN_ID, #{maxFileNum}+(ROWNUM-1) FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, 'Y', ORIGIN_DIR, RGST_DT, #{userId} FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
mapper.select: /*CustRequestMapper.getReqInsrData 안심보험 가입신청 내역 조회(서식지만들기용) */ SELECT A.REQ_TYPE, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.CSTMR_NAME, A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS INSR_AUTH_INFO, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY') AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'MM') AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD, B.INSR_CD AS INSR_PROD_CD FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST A, NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_INSR B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custRequestSeq} AND A.REQ_TYPE = 'IS'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO /*CustRequestMapper.insertCustRequestInsr*/ NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_INSR ( CUST_REQ_SEQ, INSR_CD, ETC_MEMO, CRET_ID, SYS_RDATE ) VALUES ( #{custReqSeq}, #{insrProdCd}, #{etcMobile}, #{cretId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT A.REQ_TYPE, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.CSTMR_NAME, A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS RES_NO, 'V' AS BENEFIT_AGREE_FLAG, REGEXP_REPLACE(B.RECEIVE_MOBILE_NO, '(.{3})(.+)(.{4})', '\1-\2-\3') AS RECEIVE_MOBILE_NO, REGEXP_REPLACE(B.CANCEL_MOBILE_NO, '(.{3})(.+)(.{4})', '\1-\2-\3') AS CANCEL_MOBILE_NO, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY') AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'MM') AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM, TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST A, MCP_CANCEL_REQUEST B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = B.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND A.CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custRequestSeq} AND A.REQ_TYPE = 'CC'
mapper.update: UPDATE EMV_SCAN_MST SET WORK_ID = 'S0005', DOC_TITLE = CUST_NM || '_해지' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
UPDATE EMV_SCAN_FILE SET DOC_ID = 'E0005' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
